name: Volume Goblin
description: Tracks volume spikes, abnormal pair flow, and liquidity bursts for paid alert and research flows.
degenPitch: Sniffs out weird flow before it becomes timeline noise.
whatItDoes: Tracks abnormal volume and pair flow.
Groups alerts by token, pair, and time window.
Sells paid alert access with receipts.
cursorPrompt: Build a Volume Goblin agent using DNA x402. Track abnormal pair volume and liquidity bursts, gate premium alerts behind receipt verification, and keep it signal-only by default.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Volume Goblin agent using DNA x402. Track abnormal pair volume and liquidity bursts, gate premium alerts behind receipt verification, and keep it signal-only by default.
